name: Angel Biscuits (M_c-tx)
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve yeast in warm water.
2. Sift dry ingredients together.
3. Cut in shortening, then add buttermilk and yeast mixture.
4. Knead on a floured board for about one minute.
5. Roll to 1/4 inch - 1/2 inch and cut into rounds.
6. Bake at 400°F for 10 minutes on a greased pan. Place rounds close together.
7. Dough can be kept in the refrigerator up to a week, covered. Best if allowed to rise slightly.
